title: Adobe Experience
description: Akshay's current role as a Senior Engineer at Adobe. He led the transition of Adobe Advertising Cloud from legacy architecture to a next-gen Nx mono-repo, vastly increasing developer velocity. He also standardized the UI layer by migrating 30+ custom components to Web Components.
businessValue: Shows leadership in large-scale infrastructure migrations, expertise in Nx mono-repos, and deep understanding of Web Components and design systems.

title: AI Workflow Engineering
description: Pioneered the use of AI-driven tools like Devin and Cursor at Adobe to automate boilerplate and accelerate rapid prototyping for complex features.
businessValue: Demonstrates forward-thinking engineering practices and the ability to leverage cutting-edge AI tools to increase team productivity and delivery speed.

title: Nagarro Experience
description: Associate Staff Engineer at Nagarro, where he spearheaded end-to-end design of complex UI systems including high-volume data grids. Achieved 30% performance improvements using background processing threads.
businessValue: Highlights strong capabilities in performance optimization, memory management profiling using Chrome DevTools, and handling complex data grids.

title: Core Technical Skills
description: Specialist in Angular and modern JavaScript. Proficient in TypeScript, React, Vue.js, RxJS, and Micro-Frontend architecture.
businessValue: Validates deep technical expertise across modern frontend frameworks and architectural patterns.

title: Featured Projects
description: A showcase of Akshay's latest architectural and frontend projects. (More details coming soon).
businessValue: Demonstrates practical application of skills in real-world scenarios and passion for building.

title: Contact Me
description: Get in touch for frontend architecture consulting, AI-workflow implementation, or general inquiries.
businessValue: Direct channel to connect with Akshay for potential collaborations.
